title: Carrot Hunger Bar
description: AppleSkin compatible. This pack turns the regular meat hunger bar icon to a carrot one. Faithful to the in-game carrot texture.
body:
![Hotbar Visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b8EJrjmw/images/0acd31a04696988c12557ac16fff25f7a2d0c182.png)

### <center>Welcome to the Carrot Gang!</center>
This is a very simple resource pack to change your hunger bar into carrot icons from the meat one. The carrot texture is faithful to the original in-game carrot texture.

### Features
- ![Black Carrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b8EJrjmw/images/34b0b477267122ba4493b3e8385319d095aaf353.png) Contains hunger debuff icons.
- Compatible with [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- Cool ✅
